metadata.title: Phoenix Communication — PR Agency Prague
metadata.description: A communications agency operating in the Czech and Slovak markets since 2009. Strategic PR, media relations, social media.

hero.desc: A communications agency operating in the Czech and Slovak markets since 2009. We help companies communicate with media, the public and their own people.

about.label: About
about.headline:
Strategically.
Clearly.
With a focus on
results.
points: We are a communications agency operating in the Czech and Slovak markets since 2009.
We help companies communicate with media, the public and their own people. Strategically, clearly and with a focus on results.
We combine analytical thinking, creativity and experience — our own and the expertise of long-term collaborators from a wide range of fields.
We intensively and consistently build relationships with journalists across industries.
We approach each client individually. No universal templates.
We participate in international projects across Europe.

items.name: Strategic PR
items.desc: Communication strategy, campaigns, reputation management including crisis communication.

items.name: Media Relations
items.desc: Long-term media work, media coverage and executive media training.

items.name: Social Media
items.desc: Content, profile management, campaigns and performance support.

items.name: Influencer Marketing
items.desc: Selection of suitable personalities, contractual relationships and compliance monitoring.

items.name: Internal Communication
items.desc: Communication aimed at employees and business partners.

items.name: Events & Projects
items.desc: Meetings for media, influencers, partners and the general public.

expertise.label: Expertise
expertise.title:

we operate
in.
expertise.desc: We have experience across various industries — from energy through technology to culture and sport.

clients.title:

and international brands.
clients.desc: Our clients include market leaders and innovative start-ups. For some we built communications from day one, for others we help achieve long-term goals.
